mapper.sql: c.id, c.order_no as orderNo, u.username as userName, co.name as courtName, c.booking_date as bookingDate, c.remark, c.total_price as totalPrice, co.type, c.status, c.create_time

sql.where:
and u.username like CONCAT('%',#{userName},'%')
and co.name like CONCAT('%',#{courtName},'%')
and c.is_deleted = 0

mapper.select:
select from court_booking c left join court co on co.id = c.court_id left join user u on u.id = c.user_id
order by c.id
mapper.update: update court_booking set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into court_booking ( id, order_no, user_id, court_id, booking_date, total_price, status, remark ) values ( #{id}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{courtId}, #{bookingDate}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select c.id, c.order_no as orderNo, co.name as courtName, c.booking_date as bookingDate, c.remark, c.total_price as totalPrice, co.type, c.status, c.create_time from court_booking c left join court co on co.id = c.court_id where c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.id
